case_title: LEE KEN VS ALLSTATE INSURANCE CO

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY LEE KEN AS TO DEFENDANT ALLSTATE INSURANCE CO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-21-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08
INVALID, ONLY MAILING DONE FOR SERVICE.
